title: pediocactus papyracanthus
intro: Pediocactus papyracanthus, also known as the paper spined pincushion cactus, is a type of cactus that belongs to the family Cactaceae. It is a small, globular cactus with distinctive paper-like spines that provide protection from herbivores. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Pediocactus papyracanthus, such as teas and salves, have been used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin irritations, and digestive problems.
